Dental practice
Nice, dental practice. What's your biggest challenge right now -- getting more patients in the door or keeping up with the ones already reaching out?
We get about 200 leads a month but my receptionist can't keep up

200 leads and a swamped receptionist -- that's a lot of missed revenue. Our AI agents respond in 2 seconds and book 70% of appointments automatically. Want me to send you a quick page showing how it works?
Sure send it over

Here you go: {{link_dfy}}

There's an ROI calculator on there too. Check it out and lmk what questions come up.
Ok I'll take a look
Sounds good.

Someone told me you guys do AI for service businesses?
Yep. What kind of business?
Plumbing company, we do about 30k a month
Nice. How many leads you getting monthly?
About 200 but we miss a lot of calls
That tracks. Most service businesses lose 40-60% of leads to slow follow-up. Our AI picks up in 2 seconds, 24/7. Want to see how it works?
How much does it cost
Starts at $3k setup + $99/month. But real talk -- if you're missing half of 200 leads, that's 100 potential jobs gone. What's your average ticket?
About $500 per job but $3k upfront is steep
I hear you. But 100 missed leads at $500 each is $50k/month walking out the door. The AI pays for itself in the first week. Is budget the only thing holding you back?
I mean my wife thinks it's a waste of money
Makes sense. Want me to send you something you can show her? The ROI breakdown usually makes the conversation easier.
Yeah send it

{{link_dfy}}

Video at the top walks you through everything. Plug your numbers into the calculator at the bottom.

Fair point. It's priced low because the real money is in selling the bots to clients, not in selling the course. You get pre-built templates, demo builders, and client-getting funnels. The $37 gets you in the door.
Do I need to be technical?
You're a dev so you'll breeze through it. But no, most of our students aren't technical. The setups are template-based.
What's the catch? Any upsells?

No hidden fees for the core course. There's an optional {{premium_tier}} community ($99/mo) with prospecting tools, a demo generator, and direct help from {{owner_name}}. But the $37 course stands on its own.
Ok I'm in, where do I sign up?

Here you go: {{link_cmaa}}

You get instant access. Hit me up if you have questions once you're inside.
